title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 270.240 - Rams not to run at large, when
text:
270.240.  Rams not to run at large, when. — All rams shall be restrained from going at large within this state, from the first day of May to the first of November in each year.
(RSMo 1939 § 14461) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12795; 1919 § 4273; 1909 § 770
